summary: Disambiguate 'model' in Fabric: a Semantic Model (BI tabular model queried with DAX) vs an ML Model (data-science model with versions/scoring) vs a Digital Twin Builder model vs a Graph Model. Same word, four different artifacts and command groups.

meanings.description: Tabular data model (tables, measures, relationships) queried with DAX; the BI layer. Formerly 'dataset'.
A trained model with versions, serving endpoints, and batch scoring. Managed alongside ML experiments.
A digital-twin domain model (entities/relationships for IoT/operational twins).
A graph data model for Fabric IQ / graph querying.

default_action: DAX/reporting -> semantic-model. Train/score/versions -> ml-model. IoT twin -> digital-twin-builder. Graph -> graph-model. If unclear, ask whether they mean BI (semantic) or ML (data science).
